Class RmiVirtualView

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiVirtualView
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameView, PropertyChangeListener, EventListener
public class RmiVirtualView extends Object implements GameView, PropertyChangeListener
Server-side view proxy used for RMI clients.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RmiVirtualView(ClientCallbackRemote callback, Runnable onCommunicationFailure)
    Creates an RMI virtual view.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    askNickname()
    Requests the client to provide a nickname (used during RMI initialization checks).
    void
    propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent evt)
    Listens to properties fired by the game model and forwards them to the client callback.
    void
    sendUpdate(SerializedUpdate update)
    Sends a structured update to the remote callback.
    void
    showLoginResult(boolean success, String reason)
    Informs the client of the login outcome.
    void
    showMessage(String message)
    Sends a notification message to the client.
    void
    updateGameStatus(String status)
    Sends the current game status snapshot to the client.

  • Constructor Details

    • RmiVirtualView

      public RmiVirtualView(ClientCallbackRemote callback, Runnable onCommunicationFailure)
      Creates an RMI virtual view.
      Parameters:
      callback - client callback endpoint.
      onCommunicationFailure - action executed when callback communication fails.

  • Method Details

    • propertyChange

      public void propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent evt)
      Listens to properties fired by the game model and forwards them to the client callback.
      Specified by:
      propertyChange in interface PropertyChangeListener
      Parameters:
      evt - The event representing a model state change.

    • sendUpdate

      public void sendUpdate(SerializedUpdate update)
      Sends a structured update to the remote callback.
      Parameters:
      update - update payload.

    • showMessage

      public void showMessage(String message)
      Sends a notification message to the client.
      Specified by:
      showMessage in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      message - The text message to show.

    • updateGameStatus

      public void updateGameStatus(String status)
      Sends the current game status snapshot to the client.
      Specified by:
      updateGameStatus in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      status - The serialized game status.

    • askNickname

      public void askNickname()
      Requests the client to provide a nickname (used during RMI initialization checks).
      Specified by:
      askNickname in interface GameView

    • showLoginResult

      public void showLoginResult(boolean success, String reason)
      Informs the client of the login outcome.
      Specified by:
      showLoginResult in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      success - true if login succeeded, false otherwise.
      reason - The descriptive reason for success or failure.
